description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

After all Phase 2 components pass quality gates, publish the 1.0.0 stable release. This is the first production-ready release. Includes all 25+ Tier 1 components, changesets changelog, migration guide from beta.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/package.json
- .changeset/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 25+ components pass 7-gate quality pipeline
- [ ] Changeset version bump to 1.0.0
- [ ] Migration guide from 0.1.x to 1.0.0
- [ ] npm publish with provenance
- [ ] Release notes with full component catalog
- [ ] Starlight docs site updated

**Complexity:** medium
title: Publish @helix/library@1.0.0 stable release
